query:
SELECT id, name, status, 
  CASE WHEN action_plans_data IS NULL THEN 'NULL' 
       WHEN action_plans_data = '{}' THEN 'EMPTY_OBJECT'
       WHEN action_plans_data = '' THEN 'EMPTY_STRING'
       ELSE CONCAT('HAS_DATA: ', LEFT(action_plans_data, 100))
  END as action_plans_status,
  CHAR_LENGTH(action_plans_data) as action_plans_length
FROM projects WHERE id = 90003;
